search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae sinusitis telehealth guideline PDF UAE
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Medicine names and doses were outside documentation scope.
The workflow must not infer bacterial infection.
Non-official summaries were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for guideline-described acute rhinosinusitis; chronic sinus disease, young children, pregnancy, and every dental or neurological differential are not fully covered.
setting_applicability: Direct for DHA-licensed telehealth history and red-flag review; physical examination, imaging selection, diagnosis, treatment, and referral urgency remain clinician-led.
UAE_applicability: Verified for Dubai Health Authority telehealth services.
recency_verification: The current DHA Issue 2 sinusitis PDF, due for revision 2029-02-21, was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer official DHA sinusitis issue was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped sinusitis terminology, symptoms, selected negatives, nasal or sinus examination, dental context, temperature, and history fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines duration patterns and lists congestion, discharge, postnasal drip, dental discomfort, facial pain or pressure, fever, fatigue, cough, smell change, and headache.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped visual, facial, headache, mental-status, and immune-status prompts only when assessed.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists high fever, frontal or periorbital swelling, severe headache, meningeal or mental-status change, visual change, and persistent unilateral or bloody symptoms.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports clinician-selected imaging, return, worsening, and arranged follow-up documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Limits imaging and other tests to clinician-selected contexts and lists emergency, specialist, systemic-illness, and non-response referral criteria.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports clinician-documented symptom care, medicine decisions, management discussion, and questions without autonomous treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Provides clinician-led conservative and pharmacological management choices; no dose-bearing content is mapped into this project.

unresolved_source_gaps: Throat examination, ear examination, previous-record review, fixed one-to-two-week timing, and broad duration presets remain unsupported.
Sinusitis remains clinician-stated; bacterial disease, complication, imaging need, medicine choice, and urgency must not be inferred.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
